desc.nova-flight.coilguns: With the rapid advancement of electromagnetic technology, the coilgun debuted as a prototype weapon. Ditching traditional chemical propulsion, electromagnetic coils accelerate projectiles more efficiently.
desc.nova-flight.railguns: The latest in electromagnetic acceleration, railguns use parallel rails to launch projectiles at unbelievable speeds.
desc.nova-flight.kinetic_artillery: Long range, massive power, high accuracy — the motto of kinetic artillery. Its shells don't explode, but punch through all obstacles and keep flying... and flying...
desc.nova-flight.autocannon: Unlocks the rapid-fire weapon branch. Reduced projectile size allows for higher firing rates. "Ever since Dr. Gatling invented the machine gun, the study of suppression weapons has never ceased — all the way into the 30th millennium."
desc.nova-flight.minigun: Unlocks the "Minigun" (Micro-penetrator). Using 25mm caliber, damage and armor penetration are reduced, but the vastly increased fire rate can halt enemy ships in their tracks.
desc.nova-flight.ciws: Unlocks the "CIWS" (Close-In Weapon System). On a distant planet, humble villagers shared point-defense technology with you. Unmatched at intercepting missiles and clearing close-range threats, but its extreme fire rate leads to rapid overheating.
desc.nova-flight.flak_battery: Specialized flak cannons fire interception rounds at close range. Orders for these effective little "pipes" piled up as soon as they were developed.
desc.nova-flight.flak_cannons: Locked targets[32m +1 [0m, Damage[32m +1 [0m. Upgraded flak guns are equipped with new, more powerful high-explosive rounds that airburst for efficient interception.
desc.nova-flight.flak_artillery: Locked targets[32m +1 [0m, Damage[32m +1 [0m. Predictive tracking algorithms and powerful salvos give these flak guns an incredible ability to destroy enemy projectiles.
desc.nova-flight.laser: Unlocks the laser weapon branch. Lasers deal massive thermal damage to metallic targets, and with the right angle, can even cause ship detonations.
desc.nova-flight.gamma_lasers: Gamma lasers operate at extremely high electromagnetic frequencies. In the realm of laser weaponry, their destructive power is unmatched.
desc.nova-flight.phase_lasers: These lasers can continuously penetrate an entire line of ships, but struggle against shielded enemies. Through proper polarization, lasers can now strike through objects, though energy loss is not negligible.
desc.nova-flight.sentinel_point_defense: For large, cumbersome military vessels, installing anti-missile and anti-fighter systems is essential. "My own shell got shot down by my own defense system — any ideas?" — A conversation between a rebel pilot and crew chief.
desc.nova-flight.barrier_point_defense: Locked targets[32m +2 [0m, Damage[32m +1 [0m. Upgraded trajectory prediction algorithms improve tracking and point-defense effectiveness.
desc.nova-flight.guardian_point_defense: Locked targets[32m +2 [0m. A diverse ammunition stock significantly enhances threat interception capability.
desc.nova-flight.explosive: Art is explosion. These weapons easily handle成群 enemies. "BOOM! Who said I'm always the last one standing?"
desc.nova-flight.cannon90: Unlocks the[32m 90mm Cannon [0m, a large-caliber autocannon nicknamed "Devastator." Shells explode on impact with enemy fighters, dealing area damage. Due to shell weight, the autoloader is a bit slow. — "The Northern Alliance designers wanted to put a 125mm naval gun on a fighter. After many debates, this was our compromise."
desc.nova-flight.artillery125: The Northern Alliance designers got their way, leveraging military support. These large-caliber shells packed with high explosives lightly knock back enemies, giving you some breathing room.
desc.nova-flight.missile: Bombs are replaced with 8 tracking missiles. "Stalker Missile" — nominal range 100km, effective range 300km.
desc.nova-flight.honeycomb_missile: Launches 24 lower-damage missiles. The Honeycomb Missile原型 was a small kamikaze drone intended as a wingman, but it turned out its only talent was self-destruction — hence the missile.
desc.nova-flight.space_torpedoes: These torpedoes are essentially slow, massive missiles. They carry powerful warheads and shield modulators, allowing them to safely pass through energy barriers.
desc.nova-flight.heavy_weapon: Unlocks the heavy weapon research path: rocket launchers, lightning tech, light-energy weapons, and more.
desc.nova-flight.rocket_launcher: Unlocks the "Rocket Launcher." A barrage of powerful rockets will sweep away all enemies. "Sir, if I'm down to just one working finger, can I still use the rocket launcher?" — "Don't show off every little talent, rookie."
desc.nova-flight.random_rocket: Fires a random shell type: high-explosive, incendiary, cluster, EMP, or armor-piercing. Praise the Omnissiah — our launcher can now fire different rocket types!
desc.nova-flight.cloud_lightning: Smash darkness with thunder! Ball lightning cohesion by electromagnetic generators effectively pierces enemy ship defenses.
desc.nova-flight.arc_emitter: The Arc Emitter fires arcs at up to 6 nearby targets.
desc.nova-flight.focused_arc_emitter: Fires one arc that releases two chain arcs from the point of impact.
desc.nova-flight.particle_lance: These heavy energy weapons fire highly focused particle beams, dealing massive damage.
desc.nova-flight.tachyon_lance: An upgraded Particle Lance that fires powerful tachyon beams.
desc.nova-flight.perdition_beam: The ultimate light-energy weapon. The Perdition Beam continuously burns enemies, reducing their defenses, and damage increases over time. "Strong and powerful — once charged, you'll be the brightest in the galaxy."
desc.nova-flight.gunboat_focus: Focus on autocannon R&D, enhancing kinetic and explosive weapons.
desc.nova-flight.hd_bullet: Direct hit damage[32m +100% [0m. Made from high-strength tungsten alloy — you'd never believe they're manufactured in space factories.
desc.nova-flight.ad_loading: Autocannon fire rate[32m +20% [0m. Features advanced chain drive, shell casing recycle, and 3D-printed warheads.
desc.nova-flight.antimatter_warhead: Deals 8% of target's max health as damage. The antimatter coating easily annihilates armor.
desc.nova-flight.hv_warhead: Explosion radius[32m +50% [0m. Through the selfless dedication of countless comrades, we finally developed high explosives.
desc.nova-flight.hd_explosives: Explosion damage[32m +40% [0m. "Flammable & Explosive" may be a hit song in the galaxy, but few know it's actually an old Earth tune.
desc.nova-flight.serial_warhead: Explosion count[32m +2 [0m. Tandem-charge ammunition provides extra explosions — two surprises in one shell.
desc.nova-flight.fusion_bomb: The power of stars easily melts enemy armor. Targets at the blast center take bonus damage based on current health. (With Tandem Warhead, only the first explosion triggers this effect.)
desc.nova-flight.energy_focus: Unlocks energy weapon research. Unlocks "Electromagnetic Pulse." When first invented, the Rebellion wasn't keen on energy weapons due to power drain — until someone discovered they could clear all Imperial bullets.
desc.nova-flight.electrical_energy_surge: Triggers an[32m EMP [0mon hit. This popular self-defense system, called "Electric Thorn," is often found on elite fighter escorts.
desc.nova-flight.ele_shield: Triggers an[32m EMP [0mon hit and negates damage (EMP goes on cooldown). A clever integration of shields and EMP creates the electromagnetic shield — when hit by projectile damage, it triggers hull-surface EMP protection.
desc.nova-flight.ad_capacitance: [32m EMP [0marea of effect[32m +50% [0m, Cooldown speed[32m -20% [0m. Thanks to old man Grey's tireless work, super-capacitors now provide abundant power — toss those dead batteries aside!
desc.nova-flight.ele_oscillation: A powerful EMP that持续瘫痪s enemy weapon systems.
desc.nova-flight.quick_charge: [32m EMP [0marea of effect[32m -50% [0m, Cooldown speed[32m +50% [0m. Unlike Grey's invention, Frank believes fast recharge is key for a self-defense EMP — hence Quick-Charge Capacitors.
desc.nova-flight.high_efficiency_coolant: Weapon heat dissipation rate[32m +50% [0m. Added cooling slots — keeps things cooler!
desc.nova-flight.harmonic_analysis: Energy weapon damage[32m +40% [0m. Imperial spectroscopists developed a system that adjusts light waves based on surface materials. The Rebel spy "Red Eagle" acquired it — its原理 supposedly源自 cosmic lepidoptera...
desc.nova-flight.energy_recovery: Defeating enemy ships increases laser duration. A reflection-recovery mechanism recaptures some unutilized laser电能, thanks to Dr. Huff's research on Kyber crystals.
desc.nova-flight.static_electricity: Arc weapon hits cause electromagnetic interference.
desc.nova-flight.void_engin: Unlocks "Enter Void." Technology captured from Shadow Clan ghost fighters. By compressing space with a micro black hole, you exist in a different "dimension" from other aircraft.
desc.nova-flight.void_disturbance: Triggers an[32m EMP [0mwhen exiting the void, clearing nearby bullets and paralyzing enemies.
desc.nova-flight.space_tear: Tears nearby enemy ships when exiting the void. A副作用 of the void, micro black holes can cause irreparable damage to fighters. This technology transfers that energy to enemy craft, tearing even tough hulls to shreds.
desc.nova-flight.void_dweller: Void duration[32m +200% [0m, Cooldown[32m +30% [0m. "Void Dweller" was a Shadow Clan elder title, but after their conquest, most "Dwellers" now waste away in Empire-given mansions — a唏嘘 tale.
desc.nova-flight.void_energy_extraction: Entering void costs no laser energy and instantly cools down EMP. The other dimension is rich in electrical energy — your fighter's charging panels finally serve their purpose.
desc.nova-flight.void_leap: Void duration[32m -90% [0m, Cooldown[32m -80% [0m. Black hole efficiency is faster, but duration is shorter — you can't have it both ways.
desc.nova-flight.emergency_warp: A "Void Escape Emergency Disengagement Device" based on Void Leap technology. The acronym is fitting, as the ship's AI jokes: "Two meanings of 'voiding' — both make you want to laugh."
desc.nova-flight.ship_opt: Health increased by[31m 12 [0m. "Strong ships and big guns are the ultimate answer!" — Marshal Boris, creator of the heavy combat doctrine.
desc.nova-flight.explosive_armor: On taking damage, explosion radius[32m +40% [0m. Uses explosive reactive armor technology dating back to pre-interstellar times — but on ships, not tanks.
desc.nova-flight.emergency_repair: [32m 15% [0m chance to repair hull on destroying an enemy ship. Recycling alloys from destroyed enemy vessels — "waste not" is our principle.
desc.nova-flight.decoy_releaser: Releases decoy flares, giving missiles a high chance to lose lock.[90m (Press X) [0m. In the age of星际 warfare, carrying decoys was debated until General Takamatsu's order saved many pilots' lives.
desc.nova-flight.nanotechnology: Get to know your tiny "friends." Unlocks the nanotechnology research path. Know yourself, know the enemy — the Empire's strong ships become fragile against these little ones. Whether repairing vessels, jamming enemies, or causing destruction, nanites play a key role. They've even appeared on propaganda posters as a cute, capable girl.
desc.nova-flight.armor_erosion: Special warheads carry nanites that begin eroding enemy armor on contact. "Oh my armor!"
desc.nova-flight.gray: Repeated hits on the same target deal increasing damage. Nano-swarms consume everything in their path, inspired by cosmic locust plagues. We adapted recycling station nanite溶蚀 robots to对付 enemy ships.
desc.nova-flight.steering_gear: Ships can aim in all directions. Pilots no longer have to choose between flying and shooting — but watch out for enemies coming from every angle!
desc.nova-flight.ballistic_calculator: Equipped ballistic calculator improves accuracy against long-range targets. (Hold Left Shift to lock)
desc.nova-flight.fire_control_computer: The ballistic computer automatically calculates and aims![90m (Left Alt to toggle) [0m "Forgetting to turn it off counts as cheating?" — Imperial flagship commander "Big Sister" Catherine's taunt.
desc.nova-flight.pointer_following: Ship follows mouse position. A navigation system that sacrifices traverse gear for more flexible maneuvering via guidance beacons.
